commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds read-time stale status derivation for Skill Workshop list/inspect when create targets already exist or update targets are missing, extracts stale marking, and adds service tests.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +68. Total +167 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: create a pending proposal, manually create or delete the target skill file, then call list/inspect; current main only returns persisted `pending` status. I did not execute the scenario because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the unused helper/comment drift without changing the product decision, then refresh focused validation.

target.title: fix(skills): reconcile stale workshop proposals when target skill exists or is missing
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
